title: GEO Phase A — Static GEO Foundations Implementation Plan
summary: Eight-task implementation plan to raise opten.space's GEO score from 12 to ~30 by adding static foundations (robots.txt, sitemap.xml, llms.txt, JSON-LD, OG card, security headers, Paddle preconnect).
scope: AI crawler directives (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended)
